/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/player.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/player.dir/MediaPlayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/player.dir/Song.cpp.o -o player  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-audio.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
